properties.verseOrder: C1 V2 V3 C1 V2 V3 C1 V4 C1 V4

verse.name: C1
verse.lines: Through You I can do anything, I can do all things 'Cause it's you who gives me strength, nothing is impossible Through you blind eyes are open, Strongholds are broken I am living by faith, nothing is impossible

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I'm not gonna live by what I see, I'm not gonna live by what I feel

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Deep down I, know that You're here with me I know that, You can do anything

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: /: I believe, I believe, I believe, I believe in You :/
